content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb.dbo.#T_REF_GL') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #T_REF_GL;

CREATE TABLE #T_REF_GL
(AccountCode NVARCHAR(32),
branchcode NVARCHAR(32),
ROWNUM INTEGER
);


INSERT INTO #T_REF_GL
Select *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY AccountCode,BranchCode) AS ROWNUM 
FROM 
(
SELECT DISTINCT ACCOUNTCODE,BRANCHCODE FROM OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION 
WHERE ACCOUNTCODE <'60000' and AccountCode>'10100' and AccountCode<='20000'
)A ;

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb.dbo.#T_FINAL') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #T_FINAL;

CREATE TABLE #T_FINAL
(	CalendarDate DATE,
	FIN_MONTH DATE,
	AccountCode NVARCHAR(32),
	AccountClass nvarchar(100) ,
	AccountDescription nvarchar(100),
	BranchCode NVARCHAR(32),
	FinPeriodID nvarchar(100) ,
	LedgerID int ,
	BalanceAmount DECIMAL(16,2),
	BRANCH_CAL NVARCHAR(32),
	AccountClass_CAL nvarchar(100),
	AccountDescription_CAL nvarchar(100),
	LedgerID_CAL Int
	);
	
	
	
	
	

DECLARE @i iNT = 1;

WHILE (@i<=(SELECT MAX(ROWNUM) FROM #T_REF_GL))
BEGIN

	DECLARE @AccountCode NVARCHAR(32) = (SELECT AccountCode FROM #T_REF_GL WHERE ROWNUM=@i);
	DECLARE @branchcode NVARCHAR(32) = (SELECT branchcode FROM #T_REF_GL WHERE ROWNUM=@i);
		
		

	WITH MX_1 AS 
	(
		SELECT 
		A.CalendarDate,
		@AccountCode AS AccountCode_Manual,
		@branchcode AS Branchcode_Manual,
		B.AccountCode,
		B.AccountClass,
		B.AccountDescription,
		B.BRANCH,
		B.FIN_MONTH,
		B.LedgerID,
		SUM(B.BalanceAmount) AS BalanceAmount
		FROM
		(Select distinct EOMONTH(CalendarDate) as CalendarDate from EDW.DIM_CALENDAR) AS A
		LEFT JOIN 
		(
			Select 
			Eomonth(concat(substring(finperiodid,1,charindex('-',finperiodid)),'01-',substring(finperiodid,charindex('-',finperiodid)+1,len(finperiodid)))) AS FIN_MONTH,
			BranchCode AS Branch,* 
			from OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
			WHERE  AccountCode<'60000'  
			and AccountCode=@AccountCode
			and branchcode in (@branchcode)--,'0001','0003','0101')
			) B 
		ON A.CalendarDate = B.FIN_MONTH
		WHERE A.CalendarDate  Between '2017-12-31' and EOMONTH(dateadd(M,-1,GETDATE()))
		GROUP BY  
		A.CalendarDate,
		B.AccountCode,
		B.AccountClass,
		B.AccountDescription,
		B.BRANCH,
		B.FIN_MONTH,
		B.LedgerID 
	),

MX_2 AS 
(
		SELECT 
		CalendarDate,
		MAX(CalendarDate_Cal1) OVER (PARTITION BY AccountCode_Manual,BranchCode_Manual ORDER BY CalendarDate ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS CalendarDate_Cal1,
		FIN_MONTH,
		AccountCode_Manual,
		BranchCode_Manual,
		AccountCode,
		AccountClass,
		AccountDescription,
		BalanceAmount,
		BRANCH,
		LedgerID
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT 
			CalendarDate,
			CASE WHEN FIN_MONTH IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CalendarDate END AS CalendarDate_Cal1,
			FIN_MONTH,
			Branchcode_Manual,
			AccountCode_Manual,
			AccountCode,
			AccountClass,
			AccountDescription,
			BRANCH,
			LedgerID,
			BalanceAmount
			FROM MX_1
			) M1
			
		),

MX_3 AS 
(

SELECT * 
FROM 
(	
	SELECT 
	CalendarDate,
	CalendarDate_Cal1,
	FIN_MONTH,
	AccountCode_Manual,
	BranchCode_Manual,
	AccountCode,
	AccountClass,
	AccountDescription,
	BRANCH,
	LedgerID,
	BalanceAmount,
	MAX(AccountClass) OVER (PARTITION BY CalendarDate_Cal1 ORDER BY CalendarDate ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS AccountClass_CAL,
	MAX(AccountDescription) OVER (PARTITION BY CalendarDate_Cal1 ORDER BY CalendarDate ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS AccountDescription_CAL,
	MAX(LedgerID) OVER (PARTITION BY CalendarDate_Cal1 ORDER BY CalendarDate ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS LedgerID_CAL,
	MAX(BRANCH) OVER (PARTITION BY CalendarDate_Cal1 ORDER BY CalendarDate ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS BRANCH_CAL -- Logic implemented
	FROM MX_2
	) M1
WHERE BRANCH_CAL IS NOT NULL

	)



INSERT INTO  #T_FINAL

	SELECT 
	CalendarDate,
	FIN_MONTH,
	AccountCode_Manual,
	AccountClass,
	AccountDescription,
	BranchCode_Manual,
	Format(FIN_MONTH,'MM-yyyy') AS FINPERIODID,
	LedgerID,
	BalanceAmount,
	BRANCH_CAL,
	AccountClass_CAL,
	AccountDescription_CAL,
	LedgerID_CAL	FROM  MX_3;


Set @i=@i+1;

END;



Insert into OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
Select 
CalendarDate,
COALESCE(AccountCode,AccountClass_CAL) As AccountCode,
COALESCE(AccountClass,AccountClass_CAL) As AccountClass,
COALESCE(AccountDescription,AccountDescription_CAL) As AccountDescription,
Branch_CAL as BranchCode,
Format(CalendarDate,'MM-yyyy') As FinPeriodID,
COALESCE(LedgerID,LedgerID_CAL) as LedgerID,
COALESCE(BalanceAmount,0) AS BalanceAmount,
CAST( Case when FIN_MONTH is NULL then 'No Activity' Else 'Activity' end as Varchar(32)) as Flag,
'ETLAdmin' as CreatedBy,
Getdate() as CreatedTS,
Getdate() as LastUpdatedTS
from #T_FINAL ;
